ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the friendship */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being befriended */,
  "friendship_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the friendship request was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the friendship status was last updated */,
  "initiated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the friendship request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the friendship request was sent */,
  "accept_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the friendship request was accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_initiated_by FOREIGN KEY ("initiated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_friend_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is private or public */,
  "group_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the group's picture */,
  "group_rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user joining the group */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership status was last updated */,
  "joined_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who invited or added the member to the group */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_joined_by FOREIGN KEY ("joined_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, post, comment) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was recorded */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., content of a post) */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Device type from which the activity was performed (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device type used during the session */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
